name: Clabo S.p.A.
summary: Clabo S.p.A. designs, produces, and distributes refrigerated showcases and furniture for the food retail market worldwide. It offers refrigerated showcases for ice-cream and pastry products exhibition and conservation; and furniture for bars, pastry parlors, caf√É¬©s, and canteens under the ORION, FB, ARTIC, BOCCHINI, and EASY BEST brand names. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Jesi, Italy.
